name: Beef Manicotti
recipeIngredient: Bread (3 slices, torn into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the ground beef and first 1/4 cup of onion in a large skillet until browned.
2. Drain excess fat from the skillet.
3. Remove the skillet from heat and mix in the remaining ingredients for the meat filling.
4. Fill the uncooked manicotti shells with the meat filling, packing it into both ends.
5. Place the filled shells in an ungreased baking pan (13x9").
6. Heat the oven to 375°F.
7. In a separate pot, heat the undrained mushrooms and remaining tomato sauce ingredients (except Parmesan) until boiling, stirring occasionally.
8. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for about 5 minutes.
9. Pour the sauce over the filled shells.
10. Cover the pan with aluminum foil and bake in the preheated oven for 1-1/2 to 1-3/4 hours until the shells are tender.
11. Remove from the oven, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese, and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
